case_title: TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT CORPORATION VS. JENIQUIA C JEFFERSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 100092603) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT CORPORATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-24-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
